summary: Build and push rx-demo images using the checked-out Git commit as the image tag.
command: DEMO_TAG=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) && PUSH=1 REGISTRY=127.0.0.1:5001/rx-demo TAG="$DEMO_TAG" tools/build-and-push.sh
expected: Registry tag lists include rx-ui, api-gateway, legacy-sync-worker, read-model-projection, and loadgen for the commit tag.
